command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/setup_hermes2.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
set -e

# 1. Update model via sed
sed -i 's/default: llama3.2:latest/default: qwen3.5:9b/' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml
sed -i 's/default_model: llama3.2:latest/default_model: qwen3.5:9b/' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml
echo model updated
grep -E 'default:|default_model:' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml | head -4

# 2. Create systemd user service
mkdir -p /home/jose/.config/systemd/user
cat > /home/jose/.config/systemd/user/hermes-agent.service << 'SVCEOF'
[Unit]
Description=Hermes Agent Gateway
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
WorkingDirectory=/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent
ExecStart=/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/hermes gateway start
Restart=always
RestartSec=5s
Environment=HOME=/home/jose

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
SVCEOF
echo service file written

# 3. Enable linger
sudo loginctl enable-linger jose

# 4. Start service
systemctl --user daemon-reload
systemctl --user enable hermes-agent
systemctl --user start hermes-agent
sleep 6
systemctl --user status hermes-agent --no-pager | head -12
SHEOF
bash /tmp/setup_hermes2.sh"
